alert.reason: High failed login count (100 attempts) | Request rate spike (93 RPM)

agent_results.alert_reason: High failed login count (100 attempts) | Request rate spike (93 RPM)
agent_results.root_cause: Ongoing brute-force attack: 100 failed logins detected. Likely automated credential stuffing.
agent_results.immediate_action: Immediately block the source IP. Enable account lockout after 5 attempts.
preventive_measures: Implement exponential backoff on failed auth attempts.
Deploy fail2ban or IP-level rate limiting at the edge.
Add multi-factor authentication for all privileged accounts.
Set up alerts for >5 failed logins from a single IP within 60 seconds.

agent_results.alert_reason: High failed login count (100 attempts) | Request rate spike (93 RPM)
agent_results.root_cause: Request rate at 93 RPM. Possible bot traffic or rapid client cycling.
agent_results.immediate_action: Enable request rate limiting per client IP. Check for clients in retry loops.
preventive_measures: Add exponential backoff in client error handling.
Use a CDN or reverse proxy to absorb traffic spikes.
